signals.headline: OCBC Launches Gold Fund on Solana | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
OCBC Launches Gold Fund on Solana | YES | HIGH confidence**

Singapore's largest bank tokenized a $525 million physical gold fund on Solana as of April 21[6]. This institutional-grade development signals major financial institution adoption of Solana infrastructure and represents a concrete resolution of enterprise integration efforts.

signals.raw:
No recent confirmations, announcements, or resolutions** are reported that would shift odds, though real-time updates occur with new tweets or events like "Will Kanye tweet again by April 30?"[3][5].  
Trending categories also include general **Trending Markets** (166 live, $3M+ volume, e.g., "Nasdaq round-the-clock trading by June 30?") and niche ones like CS IEM Rio mentions[1][5].
